entries.title: Riemann-Resonanz via S(Delta_M)=mean cos(gamma*Delta_M) — Schnittstellen-Kosinus-Mittelung

entries.metric_or_result: Verdict: refuted. S(±1.85619)≈2.6e-7, var≈0.500, nicht resonant; S(0)=1.0 trivial; identisch zum Zufalls-Nullmodell; destruktive Interferenz, kein Baseline-Ueberhang

entries.metric_or_result: Verdict: open_hypothesis / experimental. Tail-x_0 in {0,-0.5}; S(0)=1.0 trivial; S(-0.5)≈-1.8e-6, nicht resonant; negative Evidenz ohne statistisch signifikantes Signal — keine formale Widerlegung der strukturellen Kopplung

entries.title: EABC/Floquet phase distribution for twin-prime candidates (n ≡ 11 mod 12)
entries.scope: CE twin-prime candidate generation for n ≡ 11 mod 12; annotate candidates by fixed EABC/Floquet phase using candidate_index mod 8; small-sieve baseline and true twin-prime hit counting; hit-rate distributions by floquet step, channel, chi phase, and sheet; phase-shift null summaries and exploratory best-phase diagnostics; explicit non-predictive governance
entries.metric_or_result: 9654 sieved candidates, 4122 twin hits at X=10^6, B=97; chi²=2.63, p=0.917, uniformity not rejected (α=0.05); max hit-rate spread 0.024 across 8 phases; exploratory max enrichment 1.03 at phase A (post-hoc [C])
entries.not_claimed: No proof of twin primes, no held-out confirmation of any phase rule, and no optimized selector

entries.title: Structured controls for twin-prime EABC analysis
entries.scope: Residue-stratified CE/AB twin-prime controls; E-033 orientation-duality feature (binary signed dual pair match); leakage-safe Dumas right-wing features from n+6 and n+8; randomized labels within residue class and phase-shift null models; negative structured-control result
entries.metric_or_result: X=10^4, B=29: stage-1 CE vs AB enrichment ~1.01; orientation_dual constant in baseline_cyclic (non-discriminative); right_wing enrichment ~0.98-1.06 with null models similar; no stable EABC/Floquet signal beyond mod-12 controls
entries.not_claimed: No deterministic prediction, no proof of twin-prime infinitude, and no evidence yet for EABC/Floquet-specific predictive power beyond residue-class controls

entries.title: Scale robustness check for structured twin-prime controls
entries.scope: The E-051 structured-control diagnostics were repeated across limits 10^4, 10^5, and 10^6 and sieve bounds 97 and 997. The sweep tests whether the negative E-051 result remains stable across scale and sieve strength; no new features
entries.metric_or_result: 6-cell grid: orientation_dual delta vs null = 0 at all scales; right_wing features not scale-stable; negative E-051 result stable across tested limits and sieve bounds
entries.not_claimed: No proof of twin primes, no deterministic prediction, no optimized predictor, and no confirmation of EABC/Floquet-specific predictive power unless observed effects exceed residue-stratified nulls consistently across all tested scales

entries.title: Dedekind-Hasse ↔ Dumas methodical interface (Cardoso-Machiavelo H_{1,7}, H_{7,13})

entries.not_claimed: Dedekind-Hasse does not prove Dumas (E-048) or EABC renormalization; no explicit map Phi from EABC configurations to quaternion orders

entries.title: Bounded DH Search and Rescue-Witness Protocol
entries.scope: Cardoso-Machiavelo orders H_{1,7} and H_{7,13}; bounded search compares norm-Euclidean remainder (EUC) with Dedekind-Hasse witnesses (DH); documents search protocol and witness structure; rescue = EUC fail and DH success
entries.metric_or_result: H17 p<=13: 3192 candidates, 0 true EUC=0/DH=1 rescues; H713 p<=11: 2816 candidates, 0 rescues; manual DH witness p=2 verified but EUC already succeeds with rest norm 1/4
entries.not_claimed: Does not prove PID globally, EABC structure, Cardoso-Machiavelo completeness, or that non-Euclidean rescues occur in the current bounded window

entries.title: Higgs bubble collision eabc analogy (topological defect production as renormalization test)

entries.not_claimed: No claim that eabc or quaternionic prime structure explains baryogenesis or is physically identified with Higgs bubble dynamics; DESY does not prove eabc; primes do not generate baryons

entries.title: HoTT Identity Layer (unit migration path witness, ideal univalence target-picture marker, DH_Quat HIT sketch, mod 12 fundamental period modeling)
entries.scope: Conceptual identity-layer interface [C] (Anschlussraum, not replacement for E-067–E-069): HoTT_EABC_Interface with explicit hypothesis fields (PathWitness/migration_path as path witness not identity collapse, period_equiv_zmod12 as fundamental period modeling not pi1 theorem, defect_repair_path); UnitMigrationPath markers; IdealUnivalenceHypothesis/IdealUnivalenceAxiom as optional target-picture markers (not Voevodsky postulate); DH_QuatPoint as HIT sketch; EabcMod12Pi1Hypothesis separate from period_equiv_zmod12; EabcMod12ChannelMapping (E-072) is finite channel check not homotopy claim
entries.metric_or_result: 0 sorry; lake build KeplerHurwitz.HoTTIdentityLayer green; hott_identity_layer_status (finite checks only, no HoTT theorems)
entries.not_claimed: Lean 4 is not univalent HoTT (Coq-HoTT stronger for univalence/HITs); migration_path postulates path witnesses (strongest core, not derived HoTT theorem); period_equiv_zmod12 models fundamental period, not pi1 ≃ Z/12Z; EabcMod12Pi1Hypothesis is separate hypothesis interface not proved; EabcMod12ChannelMapping (E-072) is finite channel check not homotopy claim; IdealUnivalenceHypothesis/IdealUnivalenceAxiom document univalent target picture as optional markers, not Voevodsky axiom or Lean theorem; univalence is equivalence between identity and equivalence, not mere implication; HIT repair is model sketch not native HIT; no formal HoTT proofs in standard Lean; HoTT does not prove EABC, Dumas (E-048), or Dedekind PID (E-053); E-073 is Anschlussraum not replacement for E-067–E-069

entries.title: shellPrimeMatchAtFirstLoss (gated on E-077)

Aktivierung erst nach blindem internem Instabilitaetsnachweis (E-077) aus gate-eligible primary track; Track B n_0=2 (energiedoku_full, [C]) darf nicht verwendet werden solange Track A primary bleibt; siehe docs/reports/shell_separation_diagnostics_protocol.md Dual-Track n0 Governance.

entries.title: WeylChiralBridgeHypothesis (Weyl-Punkte / Chiralitaet / Berry-Kruemmung auf Orbit-Parameterraum)
entries.scope: Weyl-Semimetal-Lesesprache fuer lokale Chiralitaet, Berry-Holonomie und Hurwitz-Windung auf EABC-Kanalraendern
entries.defensive_scope: Weyl-Gleichung ist Metapher fuer massless chiral modes — kein Beweis von EABC, Dedekind Phi oder Berry-Identitaet; kein physikalisches Weyl-Semimetall im Formal Core.

entries.title: OnsagerReciprocalBridgeHypothesis (Reziprozitaet / Hall-Klitzing / Isotropie-Defekt-Kompensation)
entries.scope: Onsager L_ij=L_ji als globale Kopplungssymmetrie-Lesesprache; Hall/Klitzing-Resonanz und 24I3-Isotropie ohne physikalische Identifikation
entries.defensive_scope: Onsager-Reziprozitaet beweist keine Dedekind-Symmetrie, kein ShellSeparationLoss und kein Collatz; QHE ist Resonanzsprache, nicht Hurwitz-Primidentitaet.

entries.title: Onsager Quantization Bridge (Flussquantisierung / Wirbel / Ising / Reziprozitaet)
entries.scope: Vier Onsager-Achsen als Resonanzsprache fuer Diskretisierung, Umlauf, Kritikalitaet, Zeitumkehr in EABC
entries.defensive_scope: Keine physikalische Identifikation; ergaenzt E-076 ohne gegenseitige Deduktion; Ising-Kritikalitaet ist keine ShellSeparationLoss-Behauptung; Onsager-Reversibilitaet beweist keine Dedekind-Symmetrie.
